summary: Smoke test of StitchLog Suite v5 frontend (localStorage-only). Landing, admin auth (good/bad), admin dashboard KPIs, sidebar nav, employees CRUD, logout, and localStorage persistence all verified. Worker login partial verification — operator dropdown testid suspected mismatch (worker-operator-select not found).
passed: Landing screen renders both CTAs (enter-worker-terminal, enter-admin-vault)
Admin login with bad password shows admin-login-error
Admin login admin1/password123 reaches dashboard with all 4 KPI tiles (kpi-open-cards, kpi-active-force, kpi-active-lots, kpi-gross-outlay)
All 7 sidebar nav testids present and clickable (nav-dashboard, nav-employees, nav-productions, nav-calendar_setup, nav-jobcards, nav-reports, nav-vault)
Employees CRUD: created 'Test Employee Z' via emp-name/wage/pin/role-select + emp-submit; row visible in employees-table
logout-btn returns user to landing screen
localStorage persistence verified: all 5 keys (sl_emp_v5, sl_prod_v5, sl_jobs_v5, sl_lv_v5, sl_hol_v5) present; new employee persisted in sl_emp_v5

failed.issue: data-testid="worker-operator-select" not found on operator dropdown. Visible 'Select Identity / Choose name' dropdown exists but lacks expected testid. Wrong-PIN error path could not be exercised because operator selection could not be made via testid.
failed.evidence: Playwright: 'Page.select_option: Timeout 7000ms exceeded - waiting for locator [data-testid="worker-operator-select"]'. Screenshot shows dropdown with placeholder '— Choose name —' and native validation 'Please select an item in the list.'

action_items: Verify the operator select element in worker-login-form has data-testid="worker-operator-select" (or document the actual testid so tests can target it). Same check recommended for downstream worker-flow selects (product-select, batch-select, actas-select) and admin emp-role-select consistency.
notes: Deferred to full QA: Productions CRUD cycle, Calendar holidays, full Job cards open/close + concurrency cap alert, Reports (cost ledger / batches_dashboard CSV / exceptions), corrections override, vault export/wipe, worker ₹ symbol hiding, leave classification thresholds, hard-reload persistence. Native dialog handler (page.on('dialog')) was wired as instructed.
